response.justification: Candidate is dramatically overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior positions. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and PostgreSQL-adjacent (SQL/MongoDB) background matches the stack well, and AI/MCP work aligns with nice-to-haves. However, seniority mismatch raises retention and salary-fit concerns, and the resume shows no specific PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy/construction domain experience. On-site presence in Berlin is feasible since candidate is based there.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience across multiple Berlin companies
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) aligned with role values
AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure experience matches nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position suggests likely salary/role expectation gap
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB and GraphQL instead)
No domain experience in renewable energy, construction tech, or energy consulting
